# tfe_admin_smtp_settings

Manages SMTP settings for Terraform Enterprise.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `auth` (String) The authentication type. Valid values are 'none', 'plain', and 'login'.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether SMTP is enabled. When enabled, all other attributes must have valid values.
- `host` (String) The hostname of the SMTP server.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password used to authenticate to the SMTP server. Required if auth is 'login' or 'plain'.
- `password_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The password in write only used to authenticate to the SMTP server. Required if auth is 'login' or 'plain'.
- `password_wo_version` (Number) Version of the write-only private key to trigger updates
- `port` (Number) The port of the SMTP server.
- `sender` (String) The desired sender email address.
- `test_email_address` (String) The email address to send a test message to. This value is not persisted and is only used during testing.
- `username` (String) The username used to authenticate to the SMTP server. Required if auth is 'login' or 'plain'.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the SMTP settings. Always 'smtp'.
